summary: Phase 3 Admin Dashboard tested end-to-end. Backend admin APIs (auth, stats, CRUD for products/coupons/blog, image upload+serve, order status advance, customers list, reviews/newsletter/messages, site-content homepage, profile update) all PASS. Non-admin gets 403, unauthenticated gets 401. Public regressions OK for /api/products. Frontend admin UI renders all 11 tabs, dashboard stats, and product modal with form after SPA login. One frontend bug confirmed: hard-reloading /admin while authenticated redirects to /auth.
passed: GET /api/admin/stats: total_orders=3, total_revenue=2777.2, total_customers=10, total_products=9, recent_orders[] present
PUT /api/admin/site-content/homepage saves; GET /api/site-content/homepage returns saved hero_title='T1 Test Hero Title'
Frontend: after admin login (SPA nav to /admin), all 11 sidebar tabs visible (dashboard, products, orders, customers, coupons, newsletter, messages, reviews, blog, homepage, profile)
Frontend: add-product-btn opens product-form-modal with full form fields

failed.issue: Hard reload (or direct browser navigation) to /admin while an admin token exists in localStorage redirects to /auth instead of showing the admin panel. Cause: useEffect in Admin.jsx checks `if (!user) navigate('/auth')` before AuthContext finishes loading the user from /api/auth/me. SPA in-app navigation works fine.
failed.evidence: After successful login (token persisted in localStorage), `page.goto('/admin')` results in page.url=/auth. Same admin token via SPA pushState to /admin shows full panel with all 11 tabs.

failed.issue: GET /api/categories returned 404 and POST /api/ai/quiz returned 404 on the paths tried. These were not part of Phase 3 scope and the actual endpoint paths may differ; not verified further.

product-form-modal does not close on Escape key; only the X (close) button dismisses it. Modal also overlays sidebar buttons (intercepts pointer events) until closed — expected behaviour for a modal, but tests must always close it via the X button rather than Escape.
failed.evidence: Playwright: after page.keyboard.press('Escape'), modal still present; subsequent click on admin-tab-homepage intercepted by product-form-modal.

action_items: In /app/frontend/src/pages/Admin.jsx (and/or AuthContext), gate the redirect on a `loading` flag so the guard waits until /auth/me resolves before deciding. Recommended: `if (loading) return null; if (!user) navigate('/auth'); else if (!user.is_admin) ...`. This will fix hard-reload redirection bug on /admin.
(Optional) Add Escape-key handler to close product-form-modal for better UX.
(Optional) Verify exact public paths for categories and AI quiz; ensure they are exposed and documented.
